title: De-Glint My Items!
description: Removes/Hides the enchantment glint from items that use a new special enchantment
body:
### <center>De-Glint My Items!</center>

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6c3e1fa27311f708535c74e60af6d4ad17c4bd3.png)


Adds a new enchantments (De-Glint Enchantment) that allows you to hide the enchantment glint that's on your enchanted tools without

removing any enchantment so you can hide how truly powerful you are


**
The new enchantment can be obtained like any other enchantment (Enchanting Table, Trading, Loot, etc..)

With a very low cost of 1xp**
